2606.23327.title: VideoAgent: All-in-One Framework for Video Understanding and Editing
2606.23327.paper_summary: Video editing has become essential in digital media creation, yet existing automated systems are restricted to short segment processing and domain-specific tasks. They face two critical limitations: i) inability to handle diverse video comprehension and editing operations, and ii) lack of long-video understanding for coherent narrative creation. We propose VideoAgent, an all-in-one agentic framework addressing these challenges through two key innovations. First, we develop automated video shot creation with shot planning agents for coherent narratives and cross-modal retrieval for aligned visual content. Second, we design a multi-agent orchestration framework integrating over thirty specialized editing agents. Intent parsing filters relevant tools while textual-gradient graph optimization assembles complex editing pipelines. Extensive experiments on our newly-proposed VideoEdit benchmark and public datasets demonstrate VideoAgent's superiority over existing multimodal LLMs and agentic systems. VideoAgent achieves 87-95% orchestration success rates while reducing API costs by 60%. Human evaluation across six video categories shows VideoAgent produces professional-quality content approaching human-level performance, with ratings only 4% below human-created videos. We release our code at https://github.com/HKUDS/VideoAgent.
2606.23327.paper_summary_zh: 視頻編輯已成為數位媒體創作中不可或缺的一部分，但現有的自動化系統僅限於短片段處理和特定領域任務。它們面臨兩個關鍵限制：i) 無法處理多樣的視頻理解和編輯操作，以及 ii) 缺乏對長視頻的理解以創建連貫的敘事。我們提出了VideoAgent，一個全方位的代理框架，通過兩項關鍵創新來解決這些挑戰。首先，我們開發了自動視頻鏡頭創建，利用鏡頭規劃代理來實現連貫的敘事，並進行跨模態檢索以獲取對齊的視覺內容。其次，我們設計了一個多代理協作框架，整合了三十多個專業編輯代理。意圖解析過濾相關工具，而文本梯度圖優化則組裝複雜的編輯管道。在我們新提出的VideoEdit基準和公共數據集上進行的廣泛實驗顯示，VideoAgent在現有的多模態LLM和代理系統中具有優越性。VideoAgent實現了87-95%的協作成功率，同時將API成本降低了60%。在六個視頻類別中的人類評估顯示，VideoAgent產出的專業質量內容接近人類水平，評分僅比人類創建的視頻低4%。我們的代碼已在https://github.com/HKUDS/VideoAgent上發布。
2606.23327.author: Hengji Zhou et.al.
2606.23327.authors: Hengji Zhou, Lingxuan Huang, Jian Wang, Bing Zhou, Si Wu, Lianghao Xia, Chao Huang
